title: Collapse release skills to one (GitHub-only) + update CLAUDE.md/versioning docs
activeSessionTitle: Collapse release skills to one GitHub-only mpi-release skill
description: Release model simplified to GitHub-only (see memory project_release_model_github_only). Collapse the 3 release skills (mpi-merge-branches + mpi-apply-patch + mpi-release-public) into ONE release skill: bump a version digit (2nd = new features, 3rd = fixes - now the SAME mechanical op), build portable, publish a GitHub release. No branch merging, no Patreon tiers, no Cloudflare pre-release links. mpi-version-bump stays as the file-edit mechanic; build-dispatch.md + copy-review.md fold into the new skill; link-model.md + r2-upload.md + mpi-release-shared go (R2 still used for model WEIGHTS). Then update mpi-version-bump + mpi-end step 3, docs/releases/* (README, portable-distribution-contract, github-release-checklist, delete patch-distribution.md), and kanban project-knowledge-index. VERIFIED clean, NO change: CLAUDE.md, .claude/rules/versioning.md, docs/versioning.md. Approved forks: GitHub release carries full + update bundles; banner plans/app-update-strategy.md.
